name: Rabbit
options: { height: 0.6, len: 0.34, bodyR: 0.12, legLen: 0.14, snout: true }
notes: Long upright capsule ears with lighter inner lining, pink nose, and an oversized round cotton tail make the silhouette unmistakably a rabbit, not a generic quad.

name: Cow
options: { height: 1.1, len: 0.6, bodyR: 0.26, legLen: 0.32, snout: true, tail: true }
notes: Big horned bovine: wide outward-curving horns, floppy ears, pink muzzle and udder, plus dark Holstein blotches via addSpots for the spotted hide.

name: Squirrel
options: { height: 0.6, len: 0.3, bodyR: 0.1, legLen: 0.14, snout: true }
notes: Tiny body with tufted cone ears and a giant bushy tail built from stacked fluff spheres that sweeps up and over the back, the squirrel's signature silhouette.

name: Pigeon
options: { combColor: 0x666666 }
notes: Small grey city bird: plump body with an iridescent green neck ring (torus), folded side wings and a flat fan tail. The bird base's red comb is recolored grey via combColor.

name: Seagull
options: { combColor: 0xddaa33 }
notes: White-bodied coast gull: grey mantle wings with black wingtips, a grey crown cap, and a pointed swept tail. Use a white tint; the orange beak stays from the bird base.

name: Chicken
options: { combColor: 0xcc3322 }
notes: Upgrades the plain bird base into a proper hen: red wattle under the beak (comb already on base), an upright fan of tail-feather cones, and folded side wings.

name: Sheep
options: { height: 0.9, len: 0.42, bodyR: 0.2, legLen: 0.22, ears: true, legMat: 0x33312e }
notes: Replaces the base single fluff blob with a dense cloud of overlapping wool spheres for a genuinely woolly silhouette, plus a dark face and dark legs (legMat).

name: Deer
options: { height: 1.1, len: 0.5, bodyR: 0.15, legLen: 0.38, ears: true, tail: true }
notes: Slender tall-legged frame with proper branching antlers (main beam + forked tines) instead of the base's single spikes, plus white dappling and a pale throat patch.

name: Boar
options: { height: 1, len: 0.5, bodyR: 0.2, legLen: 0.24, snout: true, tail: true }
notes: Bulky low-slung pig with big upturned ivory tusks, a bristly spine mane (addMane on the body), and a dark snout disc; bristles are the boar's defining detail.

name: Wolf
options: { height: 1, len: 0.55, bodyR: 0.16, legLen: 0.3, ears: true }
notes: Lean canine with a shaggy fur ruff around the neck (addFur on the head), an elongated capsule snout with a black nose, and a thick bushy tail hanging low.

name: Bear
options: { height: 1.1, len: 0.55, bodyR: 0.24, legLen: 0.3, snout: true }
notes: Massive shaggy bruin: three rings of body fur for bulk, small round ears, a tan muzzle with black nose, and big white claws on all four paws.

name: Orc
options: { height: 1.05, girth: 1.25, tusks: true, ears: true, spots: true, spotFactor: 0.65, spotCount: 5, claws: true, shoulders: true, armorColor: 0x4a3522, belly: true, bellyColor: 0x6f8a4a, weapon: 'axe', maneColor: 0x222018, hornColor: 0xf0ece0 }
notes: Stocky pot-bellied grunt with jutting underbite jaw, heavy brow ridge and a leather chest strap, axe in hand.

name: Orc Warrior
options: { height: 1.12, girth: 1.2, tusks: true, ears: true, claws: true, shoulders: true, armorColor: 0x6a6f78, belly: true, bellyColor: 0x5a6a3a, weapon: 'sword', weaponCurve: true, weaponOpts: { mat: { } } }
notes: Disciplined soldier: riveted steel pauldrons and a banded leather waist skirt, swinging a curved sabre.

name: Orc Spearman
options: { height: 1.15, girth: 0.95, tusks: true, ears: true, claws: true, weapon: 'spear', maneColor: 0x2a2418 }
notes: Tall lean skirmisher with a wooden buckler on the off-arm and a bound red plume topknot, long spear.

name: Orc Berserker
options: { height: 1.35, girth: 1.55, tusks: true, ears: true, spots: true, spotFactor: 1.4, spotCount: 9, claws: true, belly: true, bellyColor: 0x4a6a2a, weapon: 'battleaxe', mane: true, maneColor: 0x1a160e, maneCount: 7 }
notes: Massive shirtless rager: pale scars, bulging deltoids, war-paint chevron and oversized tusks, two-hand battleaxe.

name: Orc Shaman
options: { height: 1.1, girth: 1.05, tusks: true, ears: true, hood: true, hoodColor: 0x3a4a30, weapon: 'staff', weaponOpts: { orb: 0x7fe66a } }
notes: Robed witch-doctor: floor-length cloak, dangling bone fetishes, glowing green tattoo dots and a skull totem, green-orb staff.

name: Orc Rider
options: { tint: 0x6a8a4a }
notes: COMPOSITE: a grey wolf mount (quad-animated trot) carrying a seated, helmeted orc rider whose raised right arm swings a curved sabre.

name: Orc Leader
options: { height: 1.3, girth: 1.4, tusks: true, ears: true, claws: true, shoulders: true, armorColor: 0x7a7f88, belly: true, bellyColor: 0x6a6f78, weapon: 'sword', weaponBig: true }
notes: Plate-armored captain: breastplate with gold trim, spiked pauldrons and a side-horned iron helm, wielding a great sword.

name: Orc Warlord
options: { height: 1.7, girth: 1.7, tusks: true, ears: true, spots: true, spotFactor: 0.6, spotCount: 6, claws: true, shoulders: true, armorColor: 0x8a8f98, belly: true, bellyColor: 0x5a6a3a, weapon: 'mace', weaponBig: true, weaponOpts: { spikes: true } }
notes: BOSS: eight-foot tyrant with towering horn-crest pauldrons, gold gorget and rune breastplate, fur-trimmed cape and a fanged horned skull-mask helm, hefting a giant spiked war-hammer.

name: Goblin
options: { height: 0.8, girth: 1.0, ears: true, headScale: 1.25, belly: true, bellyColor: 0x9fcf6a, claws: true, weapon: 'club' }
notes: Short potbellied goblin with an oversized head, big hooked nose, huge droopy ears and a loincloth, swinging a club.

name: Goblin Scavenger
options: { height: 0.78, girth: 0.95, ears: true, headScale: 1.2, claws: true, weapon: 'sword' }
notes: Scrappy looter in a dented brimmed pot-helm with a scrap shoulder pad and a back loot-satchel, jabbing a crude dagger.

name: Goblin Assassin
options: { height: 0.85, girth: 0.75, ears: true, headScale: 1.1, hood: true, hoodColor: 0x222630, claws: true, weapon: 'sword' }
notes: Slender hooded killer with a face-wrap mask, glinting slit eyes and a reverse-grip dagger in the off-hand for dual blades.

name: Goblin Leader
options: { height: 1.0, girth: 1.2, ears: true, headScale: 1.25, belly: true, bellyColor: 0x8fbf5a, claws: true, weapon: 'club', weaponOpts: { spikes: false } }
notes: BOSS goblin chief in bone armor: a ribcage breastplate, skull pauldrons with dark sockets and a jagged bone crown, wielding a bone club.

name: Troll
options: { height: 1.3, girth: 1.45, ears: true, headScale: 1.15, tusks: true, spots: true, spotFactor: 0.7, spotCount: 7, belly: true, claws: true, weapon: 'club' }
notes: Hunched green brute with a back hump, ape-long clawed arms and a wooden club.

name: Frost Troll
options: { height: 1.32, girth: 1.4, ears: true, headScale: 1.1, tusks: true, belly: true, bellyColor: 0xdfeefc, claws: true, weapon: 'club', weaponOpts: { mat: { } } }
notes: Blue-white troll bristling with ice-shard crown and shoulder spikes.

name: Swamp Troll
options: { height: 1.28, girth: 1.45, ears: true, headScale: 1.1, tusks: true, belly: true, bellyColor: 0x6a7a3a, claws: true, weapon: 'club' }
notes: Mossy bog troll caked in mud lumps and hanging vine strands.

name: Mountain Troll
options: { height: 1.38, girth: 1.55, ears: true, headScale: 1.1, tusks: true, belly: true, claws: true, weapon: 'battleaxe', weaponOpts: { mat: { } } }
notes: Craggy grey troll plated with stone shards, hauling a huge stone double-axe.

name: Troll Champion
options: { height: 1.42, girth: 1.55, ears: true, headScale: 1.1, tusks: true, belly: true, claws: true, shoulders: true, armorColor: 0x6b4a2a, weapon: 'mace', weaponOpts: { spikes: true } }
notes: Battle-scarred troll with war paint, a bone trophy necklace and a spiked ornate mace.

name: Furious Troll
options: { height: 1.6, girth: 1.85, ears: true, headScale: 1.15, tusks: true, belly: true, bellyColor: 0xaa3322, claws: true, weapon: 'battleaxe', weaponOpts: { mat: { } }, weaponBig: true }
notes: Crimson hulking boss with glowing eyes, spine spikes, bulging muscle and a massive two-hand maul.

name: Dwarf
options: { height: 0.78, girth: 1.2, hair: true, hairColor: 0x8a4a22, weapon: 'axe' }
notes: Short broad dwarf with a forked braided beard, ridged iron helm, leather belt and hand axe.

name: Dwarf Soldier
options: { height: 0.8, girth: 1.2, shoulders: true, armorColor: 0x8a8f98, weapon: 'bow' }
notes: Plated dwarf trooper with riveted breastplate, nasal helm and a crossbow (bow + stock).

name: Dwarf Guard
options: { height: 0.82, girth: 1.3, shoulders: true, armorColor: 0x7a808a, weapon: 'battleaxe' }
notes: Tank dwarf in towering winged helm and spiked pauldrons with a big battle-axe.

name: Dwarf Geomancer
options: { height: 0.8, girth: 1.15, hood: true, hoodColor: 0x3a2e5a, weapon: 'staff', weaponOpts: { orb: 0x44ddaa } }
notes: Hooded dwarf earth-mage with a crystal-studded beard, runic robe skirt, orbiting gems and a gem staff.

name: Elf
options: { height: 1.05, girth: 0.82, ears: true, hair: true, hairColor: 0xe6d79a, weapon: 'bow' }
notes: Slender elf with long swept ears, flowing hair, a leaf cloak, back quiver and a bow.

name: Elf Scout
options: { height: 1.03, girth: 0.85, ears: true, hood: true, hoodColor: 0x4a5a3a, weapon: 'bow' }
notes: Hooded leather ranger with crossed straps, belt dagger and a longbow.

name: Elf Arcanist
options: { height: 1.08, girth: 0.8, ears: true, hood: true, hoodColor: 0x2a2a6a, weapon: 'staff', weaponOpts: { orb: 0x99aaff } }
notes: Robed high-elf mage with a tall collar, trailing robe, an orbiting arcane ring and star motes.

name: Amazon
options: { height: 1.06, girth: 0.82, hair: true, hairColor: 0x2a1a10, weapon: 'sword' }
notes: Warrior woman with a swinging ponytail, single pauldron, knife bandolier, off-arm buckler and a sword.

name: Valkyrie
options: { height: 1.18, girth: 0.85, hair: true, hairColor: 0xf0e2a0, shoulders: true, armorColor: 0xc8cdd6, weapon: 'spear' }
notes: Winged-helm shieldmaiden boss with white feathered back-wings, gleaming plate, crimson cape and a spear.

name: Minotaur
options: { height: 1.3, girth: 1.45, headScale: 1.15, ears: false, shoulders: true, armorColor: 0x4a2c18, belly: true, bellyColor: 0x8a5a38, weapon: 'club', weaponOpts: { scale: 1.4 } }
notes: Bull-headed brute: elongated muzzle with nostril pad, big outward-sweeping curved horns, bovine ears, mane crest and chest fur, carrying an oversized club.

name: Minotaur Archer
options: { height: 1.25, girth: 1.3, headScale: 1.1, shoulders: true, armorColor: 0x5a3a22, weapon: 'bow' }
notes: Leaner bull-man marksman: shorter horns, bovine muzzle, and a back-slung leather quiver bristling with arrows; draws a bow.

name: Minotaur Guard
options: { height: 1.3, girth: 1.5, headScale: 1.15, shoulders: true, armorColor: 0x4a4e58, weapon: 'mace', weaponOpts: { mat: null } }
notes: Armored bull sentinel: steel brow band and steel-capped thick horns, iron breastplate, and a domed round shield bolted to the left arm; swings a spiked mace.

name: Minotaur Mage
options: { height: 1.35, girth: 1.35, headScale: 1.2, hood: false, weapon: 'staff', weaponOpts: { orb: 0xb066ff } }
notes: Boss bull-shaman: tall rune horns with orbiting energy beads, a halo ring of violet motes, a flared robe skirt, and a glowing chest sigil; wields an energy staff.

name: Cyclops
options: { height: 1.55, girth: 1.7, headScale: 1.5, ears: true, shoulders: true, armorColor: 0x5a3a22, belly: true, bellyColor: 0xb08a5a, weapon: 'club', weaponOpts: { scale: 1.8 } }
notes: Towering one-eyed giant: the default eye pair is hidden and replaced by one huge central amber eye under a single jutting brow, with a heavy tusked jaw, topknot, and an enormous club.

name: Cyclops Smith
options: { height: 1.5, girth: 1.75, headScale: 1.45, ears: true, shoulders: true, armorColor: 0x3a2a1a, belly: true, bellyColor: 0xa07a4a, weapon: 'mace', weaponOpts: { mat: null, scale: 1.6 } }
notes: One-eyed forge-giant: single ash-stained central eye, sooty beard, and a thick leather smith's apron with neck strap and a glowing forge ember; hefts a hammer (mace).

name: Cyclops Drone
options: { height: 1.75, girth: 1.95, headScale: 1.6, ears: true, shoulders: true, armorColor: 0x4a3018, belly: true, bellyColor: 0xb08a5a, weapon: 'club', weaponOpts: { scale: 2.1 } }
notes: The largest cyclops: a huge bloodshot red central eye, oversized tusked underbite jaw, bone shoulder spikes and warpaint blotches — visibly bigger and more brutish than the base.

name: Behemoth
options: { height: 1.9, girth: 2.1, headScale: 1.4, tusks: false, shoulders: true, armorColor: 0x1a1418, belly: true, bellyColor: 0x3a2a30 }
notes: NEW colossal dark bull-human hybrid: double horn set (sweeping bull plus upward demon horns), upward tusks, glowing red eyes, muscle chest plates, back ridge spikes, cloven hooves, and a throwing stone gripped in its fist.

name: Skeleton
options: { height: 1.0, girth: 0.62, skinMat: lambert(0xe8e6da), weapon: 'sword', hornColor: 0xcfcbb8 }
notes: Bare-bone biped: hollow glowing sockets, toothy jaw, floating rib-cage hoops and visible spine give a true skeleton silhouette, not a recolor.

name: Skeleton Archer
options: { height: 1.0, girth: 0.6, skinMat: lambert(0xe2dfd0), weapon: 'bow' }
notes: Skeleton variant defined by a back-slung quiver with fletched arrows plus bow in hand; ribs and ember sockets keep it skeletal.

name: Demon Skeleton
options: { height: 1.15, girth: 0.8, skinMat: lambert(0x2b2622), horns: true, hornColor: 0x171310, weapon: 'sword', weaponBig: true }
notes: Charcoal-black skeleton with glowing red sockets, smoldering ember cracks between ribs, and jagged spine blades — a dark tank, clearly not a recolor.

name: Zombie
options: { height: 1.0, girth: 1.05, spots: true, spotFactor: 0.55, spotCount: 8, claws: true }
notes: Rotten biped with crooked head/arm shamble, hanging jaw, a torso gash showing a poking rib bone, and decay drips — silhouette reads broken and lurching.

name: Ghoul
options: { height: 1.05, girth: 0.6, claws: true, skinMat: lambert(0x9aa37e) }
notes: Gaunt hunched corpse on a long craned neck, sunken yellow eyes, needle-tooth gaping maw, ribs poking through skin and overlong claws — distinctly emaciated.

name: Mummy
options: { height: 1.0, girth: 0.95, skinMat: lambert(0xcabd96) }
notes: Defined entirely by overlapping horizontal bandage bands on torso/limbs/head (alternating tints), a dangling loose wrap end, eye slits, and a golden gem amulet.

name: Pharaoh Mummy
options: { height: 1.35, girth: 1.0, skinMat: lambert(0xc6b888), weapon: 'mace', weaponOpts: { mat: GOLD } }
notes: Mini-boss: taller bandaged king crowned with a full striped gold/blue nemes headdress, side lappets, brow uraeus cobra, false beard and a broad usekh collar — unmistakably royal.

name: Crypt Shambler
options: { height: 1.1, girth: 1.3, skinMat: lambert(0x7d8a66) }
notes: NEW: a stitched corpse-amalgam — mismatched multicolor flesh lumps, stud-row seams, one bone arm, and a second grafted skull lolling on the shoulder. Lumpy, asymmetric silhouette.

name: Bonebeast
options: { height: 1.0, len: 0.62, bodyR: 0.17, legLen: 0.32, snout: true, tail: true, legMat: lambert(0xe4ddc8) }
notes: NEW: a four-legged skeletal hound — exposed rib hoops form the barrel, a vertebral spine ridge with erupting bone spikes, ember-lit skull sockets and bared fangs. Reuses quad animation.

name: Ghost
options: { bodyR: 0.24, hover: 0.6, tendrils: 4 }
notes: Translucent floater with a ragged wavy sheet-hem of cone lobes, a mournful hollow mouth and a faint aura shell. Semi-transparent throughout.

name: Tarnished Spirit
options: { bodyR: 0.23, hover: 0.6, tendrils: 5 }
notes: Sickly toxic-green ghost variant: translucent body recolored green, dripping ectoplasm beads, bright sickly eyes and dark rot blotches differentiate it from the pale ghost.

name: Banshee
options: { bodyR: 0.2, hover: 0.65, tendrils: 0, noEyes: true }
notes: NEW: a screaming spectral woman — gaunt face with a wide black wailing mouth and hollow cheeks, long streaming spectral hair, tattered gown lobes and reaching ghostly arms. Reuses floater animation.

name: Wraith
options: { bodyR: 0.24, hover: 0.65, tendrils: 5, noEyes: true }
notes: Dark hooded floater: a void-faced cone shroud with two cold pinpoint eyes, ragged trailing cloak skirts and a bony claw poking from a sleeve. Faceless and sinister.

name: Necromancer
options: { height: 1.05, girth: 0.85, hood: true, hoodColor: 0x2a2438, skinMat: lambert(0xd8d2c0), weapon: 'staff', weaponOpts: { orb: 0x66ff88 } }
notes: NEW: hooded skeletal mage in a floor-length dark robe (legs hidden under a cone skirt), green void-eyes, bony jaw and sleeve-hands, a glowing staff and orbiting green soul-wisps.

name: Lich
options: { height: 1.2, girth: 0.8, skinMat: lambert(0xcfd4d0), weapon: 'staff', weaponOpts: { orb: 0x9b4dff }, weaponScale: 1.2 }
notes: BOSS NEW: rune-carved skeletal archmage — floor-length runed robe, grinning crowned skull with purple eye-fire, an iron spike crown and an orbiting purple energy aura, wielding a violet-orb staff.

name: Grim Reaper
options: { height: 1.3, girth: 0.85, hood: true, hoodColor: 0x141017, skinMat: lambert(0xd8d2c0) }
notes: BOSS NEW: towering black-robed skeletal reaper — tattered floor-length robe, void hood with cold-white pinprick eyes, bony claws, and a bespoke long-shafted SCYTHE (torus-arc blade) gripped in the attack hand so swings reap it.

name: Vampire
options: { height: 1.1, girth: 0.85, hair: true, hairColor: 0x0e0e0e, skinMat: lambert(0xe8e0e4) }
notes: Pale aristocrat with red eyes, widow's-peak hair and white fangs, wrapped in a high-collared back cape (dark outer, blood-red lining) flaring to two points, clasped by a ruby brooch.

name: Demon
options: { height: 1.35, girth: 1.35, horns: true, hornColor: 0x1a0a0a, ears: true, claws: true, shoulders: true, armorColor: 0x4a0a0a, tint: 0xaa1111 }
decorateCode: const wingMat = lambert(shade(tint, 0.45)); parts.wings = []; const wy = (parts.baseY || 0.85) + 0.12; for (const s of [-1, 1]) { const pivot = new THREE.Group(); pivot.position.set(s * 0.22, wy, -0.12); const arm = mesh(G.capsule, wingMat); arm.scale.set(0.42, 0.05, 0.05); arm.rotation.z = s * 0.2; arm.position.x = s * 0.34; pivot.add(arm); const membrane = mesh(G.sphere, wingMat); membrane.scale.set(0.4, 0.05, 0.34); membrane.position.set(s * 0.34, -0.08, -0.04); pivot.add(membrane); for (let f = 0; f < 3; f++) { const finger = mesh(G.cone, wingMat); finger.scale.set(0.02, 0.18, 0.02); finger.position.set(s * (0.18 + f * 0.18), -0.18 - f * 0.04, -0.05); finger.rotation.x = -2.4; pivot.add(finger); } root.add(pivot); parts.wings.push({ pivot, side: s }); } const tail = new THREE.Group(); tail.position.set(0, parts.baseY * 0.7, -0.18); for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) { const seg = mesh(G.sphere, lambert(tint)); seg.scale.setScalar(0.06 - i * 0.01); seg.position.set(0, -i * 0.08, -i * 0.05); tail.add(seg); } const barb = mesh(G.cone, lambert(shade(tint, 0.5))); barb.scale.set(0.05, 0.1, 0.02); barb.position.set(0, -0.32, -0.2); barb.rotation.x = -2.6; tail.add(barb); root.add(tail); const goat = mesh(G.cone, lambert(shade(tint, 0.55))); goat.scale.set(0.04, 0.09, 0.04); goat.position.set(0, parts.baseY + 0.42, 0.18); goat.rotation.x = 0.3; parts.head.add(goat); for (const s of [-1, 1]) { const ember = mesh(G.lowSphere, lambert(0xff7722)); ember.scale.setScalar(0.05); ember.position.set(s * 0.2, parts.baseY + 1.05, 0.1); root.add(ember); } const w = giveWeapon(parts, 'trident', { mat: lambert(shade(tint, 0.4)), scale: 1.1, armLen: parts.armLen }); if (w) { const fire = mesh(G.cone, lambert(0xff8833)); fire.scale.set(0.08, 0.2, 0.08); fire.position.y = 1.2; w.grip.children[0].add(fire); }
notes: Tall horned red brute with articulated bat-wing fingers, a barbed devil tail, goatee, ember eyes and a flaming trident — reads as the hydra-tier fire demon.

name: Lesser Demon
options: { height: 1.05, girth: 1.1, horns: true, hornColor: 0x2a0a0a, ears: true, claws: true, tint: 0xbb2211 }
decorateCode: const wingMat = lambert(shade(tint, 0.5)); parts.wings = []; const wy = (parts.baseY || 0.7) + 0.08; for (const s of [-1, 1]) { const pivot = new THREE.Group(); pivot.position.set(s * 0.18, wy, -0.1); const membrane = mesh(G.sphere, wingMat); membrane.scale.set(0.3, 0.04, 0.24); membrane.position.set(s * 0.26, -0.04, -0.03); pivot.add(membrane); for (let f = 0; f < 2; f++) { const finger = mesh(G.cone, wingMat); finger.scale.set(0.018, 0.13, 0.018); finger.position.set(s * (0.16 + f * 0.16), -0.14, -0.04); finger.rotation.x = -2.4; pivot.add(finger); } root.add(pivot); parts.wings.push({ pivot, side: s }); } const tail = new THREE.Group(); tail.position.set(0, parts.baseY * 0.7, -0.14); for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) { const seg = mesh(G.sphere, lambert(tint)); seg.scale.setScalar(0.05 - i * 0.01); seg.position.set(0, -i * 0.06, -i * 0.04); tail.add(seg); } const barb = mesh(G.cone, lambert(shade(tint, 0.5))); barb.scale.set(0.04, 0.08, 0.02); barb.position.set(0, -0.22, -0.16); barb.rotation.x = -2.6; tail.add(barb); root.add(tail); const w = giveWeapon(parts, 'trident', { mat: lambert(shade(tint, 0.45)), scale: 0.85, armLen: parts.armLen });
notes: A scaled-down demon: same horns/wings/barbed tail/trident silhouette but stubbier and brighter red, so it reads as the demon's lesser cousin.

name: Demon Lord
options: { height: 1.6, girth: 1.7, horns: false, ears: true, claws: true, shoulders: true, armorColor: 0x1a0000, belly: true, bellyColor: 0x3a0808, tint: 0x550000 }
decorateCode: const dark = lambert(shade(tint, 0.6)); const glow = lambert(0xff5511); for (const s of [-1, 1]) { const horn = mesh(G.cone, lambert(0x120606)); horn.scale.set(0.05, 0.34, 0.05); horn.position.set(s * 0.13, parts.baseY + 0.62, -0.04); horn.rotation.z = -s * 0.55; horn.rotation.x = -0.3; parts.head.add(horn); const horn2 = mesh(G.cone, lambert(0x120606)); horn2.scale.set(0.035, 0.18, 0.035); horn2.position.set(s * 0.22, parts.baseY + 0.5, 0); horn2.rotation.z = -s * 1.1; parts.head.add(horn2); } const crown = mesh(G.torus, lambert(0x120606)); crown.scale.set(0.16, 0.16, 0.07); crown.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2; crown.position.set(0, parts.baseY + 0.34, 0); parts.head.add(crown); const wingMat = lambert(shade(tint, 0.8)); parts.wings = []; const wy = (parts.baseY || 1.0) + 0.18; for (const s of [-1, 1]) { const pivot = new THREE.Group(); pivot.position.set(s * 0.28, wy, -0.16); const arm = mesh(G.capsule, lambert(0x1a0606)); arm.scale.set(0.55, 0.06, 0.06); arm.position.x = s * 0.46; arm.rotation.z = s * 0.25; pivot.add(arm); const membrane = mesh(G.sphere, wingMat); membrane.scale.set(0.55, 0.06, 0.46); membrane.position.set(s * 0.46, -0.12, -0.05); pivot.add(membrane); for (let f = 0; f < 4; f++) { const finger = mesh(G.cone, lambert(0x1a0606)); finger.scale.set(0.025, 0.24, 0.025); finger.position.set(s * (0.2 + f * 0.22), -0.24 - f * 0.05, -0.06); finger.rotation.x = -2.4; pivot.add(finger); } root.add(pivot); parts.wings.push({ pivot, side: s }); } const tail = new THREE.Group(); tail.position.set(0, parts.baseY * 0.75, -0.24); for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) { const seg = mesh(G.sphere, lambert(tint)); seg.scale.setScalar(0.08 - i * 0.012); seg.position.set(0, -i * 0.1, -i * 0.06); tail.add(seg); } const barb = mesh(G.cone, lambert(0x120606)); barb.scale.set(0.07, 0.16, 0.03); barb.position.set(0, -0.46, -0.28); barb.rotation.x = -2.6; tail.add(barb); root.add(tail); addSpots(root.children[0] || parts.head, 0.3, 0xff4400, 8, 1.0); for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) { const a = (i * 2.39996); const ember = mesh(G.lowSphere, glow); ember.scale.setScalar(0.05 + (i % 3) * 0.015); ember.position.set(Math.cos(a) * 0.28, parts.baseY + 0.2 + Math.sin(a) * 0.3, Math.sin(a) * 0.18); root.add(ember); } const w = giveWeapon(parts, 'trident', { mat: lambert(0x120606), scale: 1.5, armLen: parts.armLen }); if (w) { const fire = mesh(G.cone, lambert(0xff5511)); fire.scale.set(0.12, 0.3, 0.12); fire.position.y = 1.25; w.grip.children[0].add(fire); }
notes: Massive near-black-red boss: a jagged crown of huge twin horns, four-fingered colossal wings, a long heavy barbed tail and magma embers swirling around it, hoisting a giant flaming trident.

name: Fire Elemental
options: { bodyR: 0.26, hover: 0.5, tendrils: 0, noEyes: true, tint: 0xff5511 }
decorateCode: if (parts.dome) parts.dome.visible = false; const flames = [lambert(0xcc2200), lambert(0xff5500), lambert(0xff9922), lambert(0xffdd44)]; parts.flames = []; const cx = 4; for (let layer = 0; layer < cx; layer++) { const t = layer / (cx - 1); const cone = mesh(G.cone, flames[layer]); const r = 0.26 * (1 - t * 0.55); cone.scale.set(r, 0.32 + t * 0.18, r); cone.position.y = parts.hover - 0.1 + layer * 0.16; root.add(cone); parts.flames.push({ m: cone, base: cone.position.y, phase: layer }); } for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) { const a = (i / 5) * Math.PI * 2; const lick = mesh(G.cone, flames[1 + (i % 3)]); lick.scale.set(0.05, 0.18, 0.05); lick.position.set(Math.cos(a) * 0.16, parts.hover + 0.05 + (i % 2) * 0.1, Math.sin(a) * 0.16); root.add(lick); parts.flames.push({ m: lick, base: lick.position.y, phase: i + 4 }); } addEyes(root, parts.hover + 0.12, 0.16, 0.07, 0.045);
notes: A bodiless living flame: stacked tapering cones from deep red to yellow tip with side flame-licks and tiny eyes — obviously fiery so the burn effect is justified.

name: Fire Devil
options: { height: 0.6, girth: 0.85, horns: true, hornColor: 0x661100, ears: true, claws: true, tint: 0xff6622 }
decorateCode: const flame = lambert(0xffaa33); const hot = lambert(0xffe066); for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) { const a = (i / 4) * Math.PI * 2; const lick = mesh(G.cone, i % 2 ? flame : hot); lick.scale.set(0.04, 0.14, 0.04); lick.position.set(Math.cos(a) * 0.1, parts.baseY + 0.42, Math.sin(a) * 0.05 - 0.02); lick.rotation.x = -0.2; parts.head.add(lick); } const tailFlame = mesh(G.cone, flame); tailFlame.scale.set(0.05, 0.18, 0.05); tailFlame.position.set(0, parts.baseY * 0.6, -0.14); tailFlame.rotation.x = 0.4; root.add(tailFlame); parts.wings = []; const wingMat = lambert(0xcc3311); const wy = parts.baseY + 0.05; for (const s of [-1, 1]) { const pivot = new THREE.Group(); pivot.position.set(s * 0.12, wy, -0.08); const membrane = mesh(G.sphere, wingMat); membrane.scale.set(0.18, 0.03, 0.15); membrane.position.set(s * 0.16, -0.02, -0.02); pivot.add(membrane); root.add(pivot); parts.wings.push({ pivot, side: s }); } addSpots(root.children[0], 0.18, 0xffcc33, 4, 1.2); const pitch = giveWeapon(parts, 'spear', { mat: lambert(0x551100), scale: 0.7, armLen: parts.armLen }); if (pitch) { const tip = mesh(G.cone, hot); tip.scale.set(0.05, 0.12, 0.05); tip.position.y = 1.05; pitch.grip.children[0].add(tip); }
notes: A small fiery imp: squat orange humanoid crowned with a ring of flame licks, a flaming tail-tip, tiny bat wings and a glowing pitch-spear.

name: Hellhound
options: { height: 1.0, len: 0.6, bodyR: 0.18, legLen: 0.3, ears: true, tail: true, snout: true, tint: 0x331111 }
decorateCode: const flame = [lambert(0xcc2200), lambert(0xff6611), lambert(0xffbb33)]; const head = parts.head; const r = 0.18; for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) { const a = (i / 6) * Math.PI * 2; const tuft = mesh(G.cone, flame[i % 3]); tuft.scale.set(0.04, 0.13, 0.04); tuft.position.set(Math.cos(a) * r * 0.6, r * 0.6, -r * 0.2 + Math.sin(a) * r * 0.4); tuft.rotation.z = -Math.cos(a) * 0.8; tuft.rotation.x = -0.3 + Math.sin(a) * 0.4; head.add(tuft); } for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) { const t = i / 4; const spine = mesh(G.cone, flame[i % 3]); spine.scale.set(0.04, 0.16 - t * 0.04, 0.04); spine.position.set(0, 0.3 + r * 0.4, 0.1 - i * 0.13); spine.rotation.x = -0.2; root.add(spine); } if (parts.tail) { const tf = mesh(G.cone, flame[1]); tf.scale.set(0.05, 0.16, 0.05); tf.position.copy(parts.tail.position); tf.position.y += 0.06; tf.position.z -= 0.06; tf.rotation.x = -2.4; root.add(tf); } addEyes(head, r * 0.2, r * 0.62, r * 0.32, r * 0.14, false); for (const s of [-1, 1]) { const ember = mesh(G.lowSphere, lambert(0xffaa33)); ember.scale.setScalar(r * 0.14); ember.position.set(s * r * 0.32, r * 0.2, r * 0.62); head.add(ember); }
notes: A charcoal four-legged hound with a mane of flame around its head, a ridge of fire spines down the spine, a burning tail-tip and glowing-ember eyes.

name: Stone Golem
options: { height: 1.2, tint: 0x8a8278 }
decorateCode: const rock = lambert(shade(tint, 0.82)); const rockL = lambert(shade(tint, 1.12)); const plates = [[0, parts.baseY + 0.05, 0.28, 0.3], [-0.18, parts.baseY + 0.15, 0.24, -0.4], [0.2, parts.baseY - 0.1, 0.22, 0.5], [0, parts.baseY + 0.34, 0.2, 0.1]]; for (const [x, y, sc, rot] of plates) { const block = mesh(G.lowSphere, x < 0 ? rock : rockL); block.scale.set(sc * 0.5, sc * 0.4, sc * 0.4); block.position.set(x, y, 0.18); block.rotation.z = rot; block.rotation.y = rot * 0.5; root.add(block); } for (const arm of parts.arms) { const fist = mesh(G.lowSphere, rock); fist.scale.set(0.13, 0.13, 0.13); fist.position.y = -0.36 * (o.height || 1.2); arm.add(fist); } for (const s of [-1, 1]) { const shoulder = mesh(G.lowSphere, rockL); shoulder.scale.set(0.16, 0.13, 0.16); shoulder.position.set(s * 0.38, parts.baseY + 0.18, 0); shoulder.rotation.z = s * 0.4; root.add(shoulder); } const brow = mesh(G.lowSphere, rock); brow.scale.set(0.2, 0.06, 0.12); brow.position.set(0, parts.baseY + 0.46, 0.12); parts.head.add(brow);
notes: Granite golem built from chunky angular low-poly rock plates jutting off its torso, boulder fists, blocky shoulders and a heavy stone brow.

name: Iron Golem
options: { height: 1.25, tint: 0x778899 }
decorateCode: const iron = lambert(shade(tint, 0.85)); const rivet = lambert(0x3a4250); const plate = mesh(G.cyl, iron); plate.scale.set(0.34, 0.18, 0.28); plate.position.set(0, parts.baseY + 0.02, 0.04); root.add(plate); for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) { const a = (i / 8) * Math.PI * 2; const r = mesh(G.lowSphere, rivet); r.scale.setScalar(0.025); r.position.set(Math.cos(a) * 0.3, parts.baseY + 0.02 + Math.sin(a) * 0.16, 0.3); root.add(r); } const collar = mesh(G.torus, iron); collar.scale.set(0.17, 0.17, 0.06); collar.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2; collar.position.set(0, parts.baseY + 0.3, 0); root.add(collar); for (const arm of parts.arms) { const fist = mesh(G.cyl, iron); fist.scale.set(0.12, 0.1, 0.12); fist.position.y = -0.38 * (o.height || 1.25); arm.add(fist); } for (const s of [-1, 1]) { const pauldron = mesh(G.cyl, iron); pauldron.scale.set(0.13, 0.08, 0.14); pauldron.position.set(s * 0.4, parts.baseY + 0.2, 0); pauldron.rotation.z = s * 0.5; root.add(pauldron); } const visor = mesh(G.cyl, rivet); visor.scale.set(0.16, 0.04, 0.1); visor.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2; visor.position.set(0, parts.baseY + 0.44, 0.14); parts.head.add(visor);
notes: Cold steel construct: smooth riveted chest plate, cylindrical pauldrons and forged fists, a bolted collar and a dark visor band — engineered, not natural like the stone golem.

name: Lava Golem
options: { height: 1.2, tint: 0x3a1408 }
decorateCode: const magma = lambert(0xff5500); const hot = lambert(0xffaa22); const rock = lambert(shade(tint, 1.2)); const torsoBody = root.children.find(c => c.isMesh); if (torsoBody) addSpots(torsoBody, 0.32, 0xff5500, 9, 1.4); for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) { const a = (i * 2.39996); const crack = mesh(G.lowSphere, i % 2 ? magma : hot); crack.scale.set(0.06, 0.02, 0.04); crack.position.set(Math.cos(a) * 0.28, parts.baseY + Math.sin(a) * 0.3, 0.3); crack.rotation.z = a; root.add(crack); } for (const arm of parts.arms) { const fist = mesh(G.lowSphere, rock); fist.scale.set(0.12, 0.12, 0.12); fist.position.y = -0.36 * (o.height || 1.2); arm.add(fist); const seam = mesh(G.lowSphere, magma); seam.scale.set(0.13, 0.02, 0.04); seam.position.y = -0.36 * (o.height || 1.2); arm.add(seam); } const coreGlow = mesh(G.sphere, hot); coreGlow.scale.set(0.1, 0.12, 0.06); coreGlow.position.set(0, parts.baseY, 0.26); root.add(coreGlow); for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) { const a = (i / 4) * Math.PI * 2; const vent = mesh(G.cone, magma); vent.scale.set(0.04, 0.12, 0.04); vent.position.set(Math.cos(a) * 0.15, parts.baseY + 0.55, Math.sin(a) * 0.1); parts.head.add(vent); } addEyes(parts.head, 0.02, 0.17, 0.4, 0.4, false); for (const s of [-1, 1]) { const eye = mesh(G.lowSphere, hot); eye.scale.setScalar(0.05); eye.position.set(s * 0.07, parts.baseY + 0.4, 0.17); parts.head.add(eye); }
notes: Charred-black golem laced with glowing magma cracks (spots), a molten chest core, lava-seamed fists and flame vents on its head — visibly burning so it deals fire/burn.

name: Ice Golem
options: { height: 1.2, tint: 0x9fd8ee }
decorateCode: const ice = lambert(shade(tint, 1.1)); const deep = lambert(shade(tint, 0.8)); for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) { const a = (i / 5) * Math.PI * 2; const shard = mesh(G.cone, ice); shard.scale.set(0.05, 0.22 + (i % 2) * 0.08, 0.05); shard.position.set(Math.cos(a) * 0.16, parts.baseY + 0.28, Math.sin(a) * 0.12 - 0.08); shard.rotation.x = -0.5 + Math.sin(a) * 0.3; shard.rotation.z = Math.cos(a) * 0.3; root.add(shard); } for (const s of [-1, 1]) { const spike = mesh(G.cone, deep); spike.scale.set(0.05, 0.26, 0.05); spike.position.set(s * 0.36, parts.baseY + 0.18, 0); spike.rotation.z = -s * 1.0; root.add(spike); } for (const arm of parts.arms) { const fist = mesh(G.cone, ice); fist.scale.set(0.11, 0.16, 0.11); fist.position.y = -0.4 * (o.height || 1.2); fist.rotation.x = Math.PI; arm.add(fist); } const torsoBody = root.children.find(c => c.isMesh); if (torsoBody) addSpots(torsoBody, 0.3, 0xffffff, 5, 1.5); for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) { const crystal = mesh(G.cone, ice); crystal.scale.set(0.04, 0.14, 0.04); crystal.position.set((i - 1) * 0.1, parts.baseY + 0.5, 0); crystal.rotation.z = (i - 1) * 0.4; parts.head.add(crystal); }
notes: Pale translucent-blue golem bristling with jagged ice shards from its back, shoulders and crown, pointed icicle fists and frost flecks — distinct frozen silhouette.

name: Gargoyle
options: { height: 0.95, girth: 1.2, horns: true, hornColor: 0x555049, ears: true, claws: true, tint: 0x6b675f }
decorateCode: const stone = lambert(shade(tint, 0.85)); const stoneL = lambert(shade(tint, 1.12)); parts.wings = []; const wy = (parts.baseY || 0.6) + 0.1; for (const s of [-1, 1]) { const pivot = new THREE.Group(); pivot.position.set(s * 0.2, wy, -0.12); const arm = mesh(G.capsule, stone); arm.scale.set(0.4, 0.06, 0.06); arm.position.x = s * 0.32; arm.rotation.z = s * 0.2; pivot.add(arm); const membrane = mesh(G.sphere, stoneL); membrane.scale.set(0.36, 0.06, 0.3); membrane.position.set(s * 0.32, -0.06, -0.04); pivot.add(membrane); for (let f = 0; f < 3; f++) { const spar = mesh(G.cone, stone); spar.scale.set(0.025, 0.16, 0.025); spar.position.set(s * (0.18 + f * 0.16), -0.14 - f * 0.03, -0.05); spar.rotation.x = -2.4; pivot.add(spar); } root.add(pivot); parts.wings.push({ pivot, side: s }); } for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) { const ridge = mesh(G.cone, stone); ridge.scale.set(0.04, 0.12 - i * 0.015, 0.04); ridge.position.set(0, parts.baseY + 0.2, -0.14 - i * 0.08); ridge.rotation.x = 0.4; root.add(ridge); } const jaw = mesh(G.sphere, stoneL); jaw.scale.set(0.1, 0.06, 0.1); jaw.position.set(0, parts.baseY + 0.3, 0.18); parts.head.add(jaw); for (let i = -1; i <= 1; i++) { const fang = mesh(G.cone, lambert(0xe8e4d8)); fang.scale.set(0.012, 0.04, 0.012); fang.position.set(i * 0.05, parts.baseY + 0.27, 0.22); fang.rotation.x = Math.PI; parts.head.add(fang); } const tail = mesh(G.capsule, lambert(tint)); tail.scale.set(0.04, 0.14, 0.04); tail.rotation.x = 1.0; tail.position.set(0, parts.baseY * 0.6, -0.18); root.add(tail);
notes: Crouched grey stone winged demon: clawed humanoid with batlike stone wings, a back ridge of spurs, a heavy fanged jaw and a whip tail — a statue come alive.

name: Water Elemental
options: { bodyR: 0.3, hover: 0.45, tendrils: 6, noEyes: true, tint: 0x2e7fd6 }
decorateCode: if (parts.dome) { parts.dome.scale.set(0.3, 0.42, 0.3); } const swirl = lambert(shade(tint, 1.25)); const deep = lambert(shade(tint, 0.75)); for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) { const t = i / 3; const ring = mesh(G.torus, i % 2 ? swirl : deep); ring.scale.set(0.22 - t * 0.05, 0.22 - t * 0.05, 0.04); ring.rotation.x = 1.2 + i * 0.2; ring.position.y = parts.hover - 0.05 + i * 0.14; root.add(ring); } const crest = mesh(G.cone, swirl); crest.scale.set(0.1, 0.22, 0.06); crest.position.y = parts.hover + 0.4; crest.rotation.x = -0.3; root.add(crest); for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) { const drop = mesh(G.lowSphere, swirl); drop.scale.setScalar(0.03 + (i % 2) * 0.015); drop.position.set(Math.cos(i * 1.7) * 0.2, parts.hover + 0.2 + (i % 3) * 0.08, Math.sin(i * 1.7) * 0.2); root.add(drop); } addEyes(root, parts.hover + 0.18, 0.22, 0.09, 0.05);
notes: A churning blue water column: a tall dome wrapped in tilted swirl-rings with a spray crest, floating droplets and dripping tendrils — distinct from the cone-stacked fire elemental.

name: Earth Elemental
options: { height: 1.1, tint: 0x6e5a3a }
decorateCode: const dirt = lambert(shade(tint, 0.85)); const moss = lambert(0x4a6a2a); const torsoBody = root.children.find(c => c.isMesh); if (torsoBody) addSpots(torsoBody, 0.34, tint, 8, 0.7); for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) { const a = (i * 2.39996); const boulder = mesh(G.lowSphere, dirt); const sr = 0.08 + (i % 3) * 0.03; boulder.scale.set(sr, sr * 0.8, sr); boulder.position.set(Math.cos(a) * 0.3, parts.baseY + Math.sin(a) * 0.35, Math.sin(a * 1.3) * 0.2 + 0.12); boulder.rotation.set(a, a * 0.5, a); root.add(boulder); } for (const arm of parts.arms) { const fist = mesh(G.lowSphere, dirt); fist.scale.set(0.15, 0.13, 0.15); fist.position.y = -0.36 * (o.height || 1.1); arm.add(fist); } for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) { const patch = mesh(G.lowSphere, moss); patch.scale.set(0.06, 0.02, 0.06); patch.position.set((i - 1.5) * 0.12, parts.baseY + 0.4, 0.16); parts.head.add(patch); } const crystal = mesh(G.cone, lambert(0x88cc66)); crystal.scale.set(0.04, 0.12, 0.04); crystal.position.set(0, parts.baseY + 0.5, 0); parts.head.add(crystal);
notes: A walking mound of earth: lumpy brown bulky body studded with mismatched boulders, mossy head patches and a small green crystal — clearly soil rather than carved golem stone.

name: Storm Elemental
options: { bodyR: 0.28, hover: 0.55, tendrils: 0, noEyes: true, tint: 0x4a4a66 }
decorateCode: const cloud = lambert(shade(tint, 1.15)); const dark = lambert(shade(tint, 0.7)); const bolt = lambert(0xffee66); for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) { const a = (i / 5) * Math.PI * 2 + i * 0.3; const puff = mesh(G.lowSphere, i % 2 ? cloud : dark); const sr = 0.16 + (i % 3) * 0.04; puff.scale.set(sr, sr * 0.8, sr); puff.position.set(Math.cos(a) * 0.16, parts.hover + 0.05 + Math.sin(i) * 0.1, Math.sin(a) * 0.12); root.add(puff); } parts.tendrils = []; for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) { const a = (i / 4) * Math.PI * 2; const zig = new THREE.Group(); zig.position.set(Math.cos(a) * 0.18, parts.hover - 0.12, Math.sin(a) * 0.14); for (let j = 0; j < 3; j++) { const seg = mesh(G.cone, bolt); seg.scale.set(0.025, 0.09, 0.025); seg.position.set((j % 2 ? 0.04 : -0.04), -j * 0.1, 0); seg.rotation.z = (j % 2 ? 0.5 : -0.5); zig.add(seg); } root.add(zig); parts.tendrils.push({ t: zig, phase: i }); } addEyes(root, parts.hover + 0.1, 0.18, 0.09, 0.05);
notes: A roiling thundercloud: clustered grey puffs with jagged yellow lightning bolts dangling and flickering where tendrils would be — instantly distinct from fire/water elementals.

name: Elemental
options: { bodyR: 0.26, hover: 0.5, tendrils: 0, noEyes: true, tint: 0xff5511 }
decorateCode: if (parts.dome) parts.dome.visible = false; const flames = [lambert(0xcc2200), lambert(0xff5500), lambert(0xff9922), lambert(0xffdd44)]; parts.flames = []; const cx = 4; for (let layer = 0; layer < cx; layer++) { const t = layer / (cx - 1); const cone = mesh(G.cone, flames[layer]); const r = 0.26 * (1 - t * 0.55); cone.scale.set(r, 0.32 + t * 0.18, r); cone.position.y = parts.hover - 0.1 + layer * 0.16; root.add(cone); parts.flames.push({ m: cone, base: cone.position.y, phase: layer }); } for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) { const a = (i / 5) * Math.PI * 2; const lick = mesh(G.cone, flames[1 + (i % 3)]); lick.scale.set(0.05, 0.18, 0.05); lick.position.set(Math.cos(a) * 0.16, parts.hover + 0.05 + (i % 2) * 0.1, Math.sin(a) * 0.16); root.add(lick); parts.flames.push({ m: lick, base: lick.position.y, phase: i + 4 }); } addEyes(root, parts.hover + 0.12, 0.16, 0.07, 0.045);
notes: The legacy 'elemental' family upgraded from a plain blob to the living-flame floater so the existing fire-element spawns actually look fiery.

name: Hydra
options: { bodyR: 0.32, heads: 3, tint: 0x336655 }
decorateCode: const venom = lambert(0x88dd44); const dark = lambert(shade(tint, 0.7)); for (const nk of parts.necks) { const headMesh = nk.neck.children[nk.neck.children.length - 1]; for (let i = -1; i <= 1; i++) { const frill = mesh(G.cone, venom); frill.scale.set(0.03, 0.1, 0.03); frill.position.set(i * 0.06, headMesh.position.y + 0.08, headMesh.position.z - 0.06); frill.rotation.x = -0.6; nk.neck.add(frill); } const drip = mesh(G.cone, venom); drip.scale.set(0.025, 0.07, 0.025); drip.position.set(0, headMesh.position.y - 0.05, headMesh.position.z + 0.14); drip.rotation.x = Math.PI; nk.neck.add(drip); } for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) { const a = (i * 2.39996); const scale = mesh(G.cone, dark); scale.scale.set(0.04, 0.08, 0.04); scale.position.set(Math.cos(a) * 0.2, 0.4 + Math.sin(a) * 0.15, Math.sin(a) * 0.2 - 0.1); scale.rotation.x = -0.3; root.add(scale); } const tail = new THREE.Group(); tail.position.set(0, 0.36, -0.4); for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) { const seg = mesh(G.sphere, lambert(tint)); seg.scale.setScalar(0.12 - i * 0.02); seg.position.set(0, 0, -i * 0.18); tail.add(seg); } root.add(tail);
notes: The three-headed hydra given venom identity: poison-green head frills and dripping fangs on each neck, a ridge of back scales and a swamp-green tapering tail.

name: Giant Spider
options: { legs: 8, bodyR: 0.34, tint: 0x221a26 }
decorateCode: const mark = lambert(0xaa1133); const fang = lambert(0xddccaa); const venom = lambert(0x88dd44); const abdomen = root.children.find(c => c.isMesh && c.position.z < -0.1); if (abdomen) { addSpots(abdomen, 0.34, 0x551122, 5, 1.0); const hour = mesh(G.lowSphere, mark); hour.scale.set(0.08, 0.12, 0.04); hour.position.set(0, 0.5, -0.65); root.add(hour); } for (const s of [-1, 1]) { const chel = mesh(G.cone, lambert(0x110a14)); chel.scale.set(0.05, 0.14, 0.05); chel.position.set(s * 0.08, 0.3, 0.5); chel.rotation.x = 2.4; root.add(chel); const ft = mesh(G.cone, fang); ft.scale.set(0.02, 0.08, 0.02); ft.position.set(s * 0.08, 0.18, 0.58); ft.rotation.x = Math.PI; root.add(ft); const drip = mesh(G.lowSphere, venom); drip.scale.setScalar(0.025); drip.position.set(s * 0.08, 0.1, 0.6); root.add(drip); } for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) { const a = (i / 3) * Math.PI * 2; const e = mesh(G.lowSphere, lambert(0xcc2244)); e.scale.setScalar(0.03); e.position.set(Math.cos(a) * 0.12, 0.42, 0.62); root.add(e); } for (const l of parts.legs) { const tip = mesh(G.cone, lambert(0x110a14)); tip.scale.set(0.02, 0.08, 0.02); tip.position.y = -0.36; tip.rotation.x = 0.6; l.pivot.add(tip); }
notes: Huge black widow boss: oversized bug body with a red hourglass on the abdomen, venom-dripping chelicerae fangs, a cluster of red eyes and clawed leg tips.

name: Treant
options: { height: 1.4, canopy: true, canopyMat: null, tint: 0x6b4a2a }
decorateCode: const bark = lambert(shade(tint, 0.8)); const leafA = lambert(0x3a6a2a); const leafB = lambert(0x4f8038); for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) { const a = (i * 2.39996); const knot = mesh(G.lowSphere, bark); knot.scale.set(0.06, 0.1, 0.04); knot.position.set(Math.cos(a) * 0.3, parts.baseY + Math.sin(a) * 0.35, 0.28); root.add(knot); } for (const arm of parts.arms) { for (let b = 0; b < 3; b++) { const branch = mesh(G.cone, bark); branch.scale.set(0.03, 0.12, 0.03); branch.position.set((b - 1) * 0.05, -0.42 * (o.height || 1.4), 0); branch.rotation.z = (b - 1) * 0.5; branch.rotation.x = -0.3; arm.add(branch); const leaf = mesh(G.lowSphere, b % 2 ? leafA : leafB); leaf.scale.setScalar(0.08); leaf.position.set((b - 1) * 0.1, -0.5 * (o.height || 1.4), 0); arm.add(leaf); } } const head = parts.head; const big = head.children.find(c => c.isMesh && c.material === o.canopyMat); for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) { const a = (i / 5) * Math.PI * 2; const cl = mesh(G.lowSphere, i % 2 ? leafA : leafB); const sr = 0.18 + (i % 2) * 0.06; cl.scale.set(sr, sr * 0.9, sr); cl.position.set(Math.cos(a) * 0.16, 0.18 + (i % 2) * 0.08, Math.sin(a) * 0.16); head.add(cl); } for (const s of [-1, 1]) { const root2 = mesh(G.cone, bark); root2.scale.set(0.06, 0.2, 0.06); root2.position.set(s * 0.16, 0.05, 0.1); root2.rotation.x = 0.4; root.add(root2); }
notes: A walking tree: bark-knotted trunk body, branchy leaf-tipped arms, a bushy multi-lobed leaf canopy crown and gnarled root feet — clearly a living tree, not a golem.

name: Mandrake
options: { tint: 0x99aa55, bodyR: 0.2 }
decorateCode: const skin = lambert(tint); const leaf = lambert(0x4f8038); const root2 = lambert(shade(tint, 0.8)); const bodyY = 0.26; const body = mesh(G.sphere, skin); body.scale.set(0.2, 0.26, 0.18); body.position.y = bodyY; root.add(body); const face = mesh(G.sphere, lambert(shade(tint, 1.1))); face.scale.set(0.14, 0.16, 0.08); face.position.set(0, bodyY + 0.02, 0.16); root.add(face); addEyes(root, bodyY + 0.06, 0.2, 0.07, 0.045); const mouth = mesh(G.sphere, lambert(0x3a2a1a)); mouth.scale.set(0.05, 0.07, 0.03); mouth.position.set(0, bodyY - 0.06, 0.2); root.add(mouth); parts.legs = []; for (const s of [-1, 1]) { const tap = mesh(G.cone, root2); tap.scale.set(0.05, 0.18, 0.05); tap.position.set(s * 0.07, 0.08, 0); tap.rotation.x = Math.PI; tap.rotation.z = s * 0.3; root.add(tap); parts.legs.push(tap); } parts.arms = []; for (const s of [-1, 1]) { const armpiv = new THREE.Group(); armpiv.position.set(s * 0.18, bodyY + 0.05, 0); const arm = mesh(G.capsule, root2); arm.scale.set(0.025, 0.08, 0.025); arm.position.y = -0.06; armpiv.add(arm); root.add(armpiv); parts.arms.push(armpiv); } parts.head = root; for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) { const t = i / 4; const lf = mesh(G.cone, leaf); lf.scale.set(0.04, 0.22 - t * 0.04, 0.02); lf.position.set((i - 2) * 0.04, bodyY + 0.3, 0); lf.rotation.z = (i - 2) * 0.35; root.add(lf); } parts.type = 'biped'; parts.baseY = bodyY;
notes: A pulled-up screaming root-man: bulbous greenish body with a carved face and open mouth, twiggy arms, two taproot legs and a fan of leaves sprouting from its head.

name: Mushroom
options: { tint: 0xcc4433, stalkColor: 0xeeddcc }
decorateCode: const spot = lambert(0xfff3e0); const cap = parts.cap; for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) { const a = (i * 2.39996); const dot = mesh(G.lowSphere, spot); const sr = 0.03 + (i % 3) * 0.012; dot.scale.set(sr, sr * 0.5, sr); dot.position.set(Math.cos(a) * 0.2, 0.04, Math.sin(a) * 0.2); cap.add(dot); } const gillRing = mesh(G.torus, lambert(shade(tint, 0.7))); gillRing.scale.set(0.2, 0.2, 0.03); gillRing.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2; gillRing.position.y = -0.02; cap.add(gillRing); const skirt = mesh(G.torus, lambert(0xeae0cc)); skirt.scale.set(0.11, 0.11, 0.03); skirt.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2; skirt.position.y = 0.33; root.add(skirt);
notes: Classic toadstool: red cap dappled with white spots, a ring of gills under the cap and a ruffled skirt on the stalk — the spotted fly-agaric silhouette.
